videos.title: 都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

Copines already has that smooth, catchy Aya Nakamura sound, and the Bombaye dance trend gives it a fun, replayable movement that feels perfect for TikTok. Tung Tung Tung Sahur is doing a dance to the viral “I Just Get So Nervy” song, folding up with wild pretzel-like moves just like @melaniatur. The nervous sound, bendy movement, and chaotic Triple T energy make this feel funny, weird, and instantly ready for TikTok green screen edits. What makes this work is how dramatic the movement gets. The “I just get so nervy” hook already feels anxious and over-the-top, but Tung Tung Tung Sahur twisting and folding like the beat is controlling his whole body makes the clip even more replayable. It has that perfect “why is Triple T built like a pretzel?” energy where brainrot chaos, viral dance timing, and Nervy trend humor all collide. Use this CapCut template for green screen jokes, Nervy trend edits, reaction memes, or any post where you want Tung Tung Tung Sahur to turn nervous energy into full body chaos. Probably not her favorite faces but I wish she knew how much we love her and care about her 😂🥹😭💕 The beloved sad girl came back in for a vet visit today.  #vet #veterinarian #doglover #vetmed

We once discussed veterinary medicine from the perspective of how humans came to the idea of helping other living creatures while spending their own time and resources on it. Strictly speaking, this mostly applies to pets, because in the industrial world veterinarians often work with farm animals. Today I want you to think about how incredibly complex this science really is. A veterinarian has to understand the anatomy and physiology of dozens of different species in order to help them. From a tiny aquarium fish to a massive python, any creature may need care, and it is honestly impressive how veterinarians manage to keep all of this knowledge in their minds while making decisions that can determine the fate of their patients. Veterinarians save tens of thousands of beloved pets and prevent epidemics among farm animals, which in many ways also means protecting human populations. Thank you, veterinarians. #Veterinarian #Medicine #Animals #edit #Pets

If your mockup images aren’t big enough, you might be hurting your shop’s reach on Etsy! Etsy explicitly recommends that your listing photos be at least 2000 pixels wide. This ensure the best customer experience – no one wants to make a buying decision from a blurry photo! Today, I’m showing you my exact workflow to solve this. I generate AI mockups using the newest models, but then I run it through the PRECISE upscaler in Playground. It actually adds details to make sure you pass Etsy’s quality test ✅ Disclaimer: This is an official brand account owned by Playground.com with content created in collaboration with Hannah Jurczak. #etsyseller #mockups #etsytips

#mascara                                    Un mascara est un produit de maquillage destiné à être appliqué sur les cils afin de les allonger, les épaissir, les recourber et intensifier le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Le mascara permet de donner plus de volume et de définition aux cils en les colorant, le plus souvent en noir, mais aussi en brun ou en couleurs plus originales. Selon sa formule et la forme de la brosse, il peut offrir différents effets : naturel, volumineux, allongeant ou recourbant. Facile à utiliser, il est un élément essentiel du maquillage des yeux, mais reste temporaire et s’enlève avec un démaquillant adapté.                     #lashes #prt #fyp #foryoupagе

اللهم يا شافي يا معافي 🤍 الحمدلله Octopus قاعد يتحسن، والدكتور يتوقع يحتاج تقريبًا أسبوع إلى 10 أيام إضافية حتى يكمل فترة العلاج والتعافي 🙏🏻 دعواتكم له، وشكرًا من القلب لكل شخص ساهم، سأل، تبرع، أو حتى نشر حالته. هذي واحدة من الحالات اللي بتكاتفنا قدرنا ننقذها ونمنحها فرصة ثانية بالحياة 🤍 وما زال في وايد أرواح تحتاج نفس الرحمة والفرصة. خلونا ما نوقف عمل الخير… كل مساعدة مهما كانت بسيطة تصنع فرق كبير  Alhamdulillah, Octopus is getting better, and the vet expects he may need around a week to 10 more days for recovery 🙏🏻 Please keep him in your prayers, and thank you from the bottom of our hearts to everyone who supported, donated, checked on him, or shared his story. This is one of the cases where, together, we were able to save a life and give a second chance 🤍 There are still many cats out there who deserve the same love and hope. Let’s never stop doing الخير and spreading kindness  #Octopus #CatRescue #Bahrain #RescueCats #AdoptDontShop

Humans are the only species that has evolved far enough to treat and help other animals without receiving any direct benefit in return. This alone seems to suggest that humanity may indeed have a bright future. Of course, veterinary medicine is still largely an industrial field, closely tied to meat production. Yet over the past few decades, we have significantly reconsidered our relationship with animals in general - and with pets in particular. Just twenty years ago, it was unusual to see an owner taking their dog for a CT scan. Today, the health and well-being of animals truly matter to us. #medical #bio #veterinaria #veterinary #human

One of the BEST things I did during pregnancy was to create and film my new 21 day weight training program, Muscle Mami. Here I am 7 months pregnant and I have no pain, I’m sleeping deeply and I’m stronger than ever. We are about to move across the country and I feel capable, confident and calm. If you told me last year this is where I’d be and what I’d be doing, I would picture myself full of stress and truly just freaking tf out. But here I am, feeling like anything is possible. And I owe that to this program. I’m ready for all the chaos, the unexpected beauty and joy, the wild ride that has been the very best adventure of my life. I would love for you to join me! The challenge is open to all. It’s not just for pregnancy, but is of course pregnancy safe. I am doing it all over again with you all starting this Monday! Let’s do this 🦋💪

Brookies-eine Mischung aus Brownie und Cookie 🫶🏼 Ich hab ein Rezept mit etwas weniger Zucker- für alle die es nicht ganz so süß mögen. Ihr könnt natürlich das Rezept anpassen und mehr Zuckef hinzufügen.  Rezept⬇️(20x20cm Form) Cookie Teig= 80g Butter  40g Brauner Zucker 20g weißer Zucker Prise Salz  Vanille 1 Ei 85g Mehl 70g Backfeste Schokoladendrops (ich hatte Zartbitter) Brownie-Teig= 135g Butter 200g Schokolade (ich hatte eine Mischung aus Vollmilch und 90% Schokolade) 3 Eier 30g brauner Zucker 30g weißer Zucker Salz 35g backkakao  90g Mehl 90g Schokoladenstükchen nach Wahl für den Brwonie Teig Evtl. Ein paar Schokodrops für oben drauf 🔥->165 Grad O/U ca. 30-45 Minuten (je nachdem wie fudgy ihr es drinne mögt) #brookies #brookie #brownie #brownies #brownierecipe #brownierezept #cookies #cookie #cookierecipe #cookiesrezepte #cookiesrecipe #backen #sweet #food #baking #chocolate #asmr #asmrsounds

#ad CHANEL IN SEOUL #협찬 @ChanelOfficial  샤넬이 서울에서 선보일 새로운 쇼의 장소가 처음으로 베일을 벗었다. 장소는 서울 여의도 63빌딩에 들어서는 ‘더 퐁피두센터 한화’. 쭉 뻗은 한강이 내려다보이는 이곳에 파리 퐁피두센터의 DNA를 이식했다. 뉴욕이라는 도시 자체를 은유하던 공방 컬렉션의 이야기는 이제 서울로 이어진다. 지하철이라는 뉴욕의 공공적 공간에서 출발한 서사는, 서울의 새로운 문화적 장소 위에서 다시 펼쳐진다. 강과 대로, 높은 빌딩과 공원이 공존하는 도시. 빠른 속도와 고요한 풍경, 서로 다른 리듬과 에너지가 어우러지는 서울의 흐름 위에서 샤넬의 공방 컬렉션은 하나의 특별한 경험이자 공유된 순간을 만들어낼 예정이다. 오고 가고, 스치고, 교차하며 번져가는 빛들. 그 안에 공존하는 익명성과 다양성, 그리고 도시의 리듬까지. 그 이야기가 곧 펼쳐진다. The set for CHANEL’s upcoming show in Seoul has finally been revealed. The official venue for the CHANEL Métiers d’art 2026 show in Seoul will be The Centre Pompidou Hanwha, opening inside Seoul’s iconic 63 Building in Yeouido. Overlooking the Han River, the space brings the spirit of Paris’s Centre Pompidou into the city. The story of the Métiers d’art collection now moves from New York to Seoul, a city where speed and stillness, skyscrapers and parks, different energies and rhythms coexist. Against that backdrop, CHANEL is set to create another luminous moment. The story is about to unfold. #CHANELMétiersdArt #CHANELShow #CHANELinSeoul CHANEL.DAZEDKOREA.COM

📲 Sui social è viralissimaaaaa! Stiamo parlando della frutta realistica! 🍓🍋 Hai sempre voluto assaggiarla ma non hai voglia di fare ore di fila? Puoi divertirti a prepararla a casa e sentirti un vero pastry chef! 👩‍🍳✨ La nostra Melissa ci mostra tutti i passaggi per realizzare l'ARACHIDE: effetto wow assicurato! 🥜😍 👉INGREDIENTI (x 8 pezzi totali) Per la ganache montata all’arachide: 5g gelatina 220g latte 150g di pasta di arachidi 100g cioccolato bianco 450g panna fresca Per il cramello cremoso: 150g di panna liquida 40g di latte 125g di glucosio (o miele) 1 bacca di vaniglia q.b. sale 75g di zucchero semolato 60g burro Per la copertura: 250g cioccolato biondo 250g burro di cacao 👉CONSIGLI E ALTERNATIVE Se non hai il burro di cacao, puoi usare l’olio di cocco, ma la copertura sarà meno croccante. Puoi sostituire il glucosio con il miele. Si conservano in frigo fino a 3 giorni. Diversamente puoi tenerli in congelatore e riporli in frigo almeno 2 ore prima di servirli. Se non trovi il cioccolato biondo puoi usare quello bianco e aggiungere un po’ di colorante liposolubile. #cookist #fruttarealistica #arachide

Strawberry phyllo pie 🍓 5 sheets phyllo dough 25 g butter Filling: 300 g cream cheese 2 egg yolks 5 tbsp powdered sugar 2 tbsp cornstarch 300 g strawberries 30 g almond flakes Brush each phyllo sheet with melted butter and place into the baking dish. Mix cream cheese with egg yolks, powdered sugar and cornstarch. Add the cream and strawberries onto the dough, fold the edges, brush with butter and sprinkle with almond flakes. Bake at 170°C top-bottom heat for 35 minutes. Pastel de masa filo con fresas 🍓 5 hojas de masa filo 25 g mantequilla Relleno: 300 g queso crema 2 yemas 5 cdas azúcar glas 2 cdas maicena 300 g fresas 30 g láminas de almendra Pincelar cada hoja de masa filo con mantequilla derretida y colocar en el molde. Mezclar el queso crema con las yemas, azúcar glas y maicena. Colocar la crema y las fresas sobre la masa, cerrar los bordes, pincelar con mantequilla y espolvorear almendra. Hornear a 170°C calor arriba y abajo durante 35 minutos. #phyllodough #strawberrydessert #EasyRecipe #homemadedessert #foodreels

How to prepare for an exam a day before? 📚  - Blurting method  1) Read your textbook 2)Write down as much as you know / can remember 8) Research the areas you missed and write those areas down to revise further. Active recall (SQ3R method): 1) Survey: skim the material 2) Question: write questions. 3) Read: Actively read the material and answer the questions you made. 4) Retrieve: write everything you can remember 5) Review: Repeat to yourself what the point of the material was. Follow for more tips 🙌❤️📚 #exams #examseason #examtips #fyp #foryou
